version_notes: v1.0.0 is the job-hunter family resume-tailor member, carved from the v5.2.0 monolith's Phase 3 (Tailor Application Materials). THE MOST SAFETY-CRITICAL member: it carries the anti-fabrication HARD GATE. Owns verify_no_fabrication.py (the detection-only fabrication gate, guarded by 5 load-bearing safety tests listed above) plus extract_ats_keywords.py (eval-only, the three-category ATS keyword-gap analysis). Splits Mode A (Tighten/Copyedit, zero-fabrication contract) from Mode B (Tailor for a specific posting, with the mandatory verify_no_fabrication gate). Reads original resume + JD; produces a gated Resume_[Company]_[Role].docx per the family workspace-contract only after every new claim has explicit per-claim user confirmation. The script NEVER auto-approves; auto_approved is always False.
